member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIModelOverride
member.summary: Represents a per-purpose AI model override configuration.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIModelOverride.Purpose
member.summary: The purpose this override applies to.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIModelOverride.Provider
member.summary: The AI provider for this purpose.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIModelOverride.Model
member.summary: The model name for this purpose.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIModelOverride.Endpoint
member.summary: The API endpoint for this purpose.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIModelOverride.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIPlanAdvice
member.summary: Represents AI-generated advice for a generation plan.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIPlanAdvice.Tables
member.summary: Per-table advice (key = FullName, value = { RowCount, TableType, Notes }).

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIPlanAdvice.CustomRules
member.summary: Custom generation rules suggested by AI.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIPlanAdvice.Source
member.summary: The AI provider that generated this advice.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIPlanAdvice.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderInfo
member.summary: Represents information about the configured AI provider.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderInfo.ApiKeySet
member.summary: Whether an API key has been configured.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderInfo.AILocale
member.summary: Whether AI locale generation is enabled.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderInfo.Purpose
member.summary: Purpose identifier when querying for a specific purpose.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderInfo.IsOverride
member.summary: Whether this represents a per-purpose override vs base config.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderInfo.ModelOverrides
member.summary: Array of per-purpose model override summaries.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderInfo.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderTestResult
member.summary: Represents the result of testing an AI provider connection.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderTestResult.ResponseMs
member.summary: Response time in milliseconds, or null.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderTestResult.Error
member.summary: Error message if the test failed.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.AIProviderTestResult.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnClassification
member.summary: Represents the classification of a database column by semantic analysis.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnClassification.IsPII
member.summary: Whether the column contains personally identifiable information.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnClassification.MatchedRule
member.summary: The rule or hint that matched.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnClassification.ValuePattern
member.summary: Value pattern suggested by AI (e.g., regex).

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnClassification.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.PromptTemplate
member.summary: Represents a prompt template for AI operations.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.PromptTemplate.IsCustom
member.summary: Whether this is a custom (user-overridden) template.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.PromptTemplate.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.Connection.ServerInstance
member.summary: The server instance (hostname or 'localhost' for SQLite).

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.Connection.Database
member.summary: The database name or file path.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.Connection.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnPlan
member.summary: Represents the generation plan for a single column.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnPlan.IsPII
member.summary: Whether the column contains personally identifiable information.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnPlan.IsPrimaryKey
member.summary: Whether the column is part of the primary key.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnPlan.IsUnique
member.summary: Whether the column has a unique constraint.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnPlan.IsNullable
member.summary: Whether the column allows NULL values.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnPlan.IsIdentity
member.summary: Whether this is an identity (auto-increment) column.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnPlan.IsComputed
member.summary: Whether this is a computed column.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnPlan.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationPlan
member.summary: Represents the overall data generation plan for a database.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationPlan.Tables
member.summary: Table generation plans in insertion order.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationPlan.TableCount
member.summary: Number of tables in the plan.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationPlan.TotalRows
member.summary: Total rows to generate across all tables.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationPlan.GeneratorMap
member.summary: Mapping of semantic type to generator function.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationPlan.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationResult
member.summary: Represents the overall result of a data generation run.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationResult.User
member.summary: The user who ran the generation.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.GenerationResult.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.RowSet
member.summary: Represents a set of generated rows for a table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.RowSet.TableInfo
member.summary: The table info for which rows were generated.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.RowSet.GeneratedValues
member.summary: Generated PK/Unique values for cross-table reference (key = "schema.table.column").

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.RowSet.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.ScenarioTemplate
member.summary: Represents a scenario template for guided data generation.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ScenarioTemplate.TableRoles
member.summary: Table role patterns with row count multipliers.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ScenarioTemplate.ValueRules
member.summary: Column pattern to value rules mapping.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.ScenarioTemplate.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.TablePlan
member.summary: Represents the generation plan for a single table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TablePlan.ForeignKeys
member.summary: Foreign key definitions from the schema.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TablePlan.HasCircularDependency
member.summary: Whether the table has circular FK dependencies.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.TablePlan.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableResult
member.summary: Represents the result of data generation for a single table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableResult.RowCount
member.summary: Number of rows generated or inserted.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableResult.DataTable
member.summary: Generated data table (when PassThru is used, single chunk).

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableResult.DataTables
member.summary: Generated data tables (when PassThru is used, streaming).

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableResult.RolledBack
member.summary: Whether the transaction was rolled back.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableResult.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.Provider.FunctionMap
member.summary: Function map (keys: Connect, GetSchema, WriteData, ReadData, Disconnect, optional DeleteData).

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.Provider.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo
member.summary: Represents column metadata discovered from a database schema.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.OrdinalPosition
member.summary: Ordinal position in the table (SQL Server).

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.IsNullable
member.summary: Whether the column allows NULL values.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.IsPrimaryKey
member.summary: Whether the column is part of the primary key.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.IsIdentity
member.summary: Whether the column is an identity (auto-increment) column.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.IsUnique
member.summary: Whether the column has a unique constraint.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.DefaultValue
member.summary: The default value expression, if any.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.ForeignKey
member.summary: Foreign key reference, if this column references another table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.CheckConstraints
member.summary: Check constraints defined on this column.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.SchemaHint
member.summary: Hint derived from view definitions (e.g., JSON/XML format).

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.ViewDetectedFormat
member.summary: Detected format from view definition ('Json', 'Xml', or null).

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.ColumnInfo.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo
member.summary: Represents a foreign key relationship between tables.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo.ForeignKeyName
member.summary: The name of the foreign key constraint.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo.ParentSchema
member.summary: The schema of the parent (referencing) table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo.ParentTable
member.summary: The name of the parent (referencing) table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo.ParentColumn
member.summary: The name of the parent (referencing) column.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo.ReferencedSchema
member.summary: The schema of the referenced table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo.ReferencedTable
member.summary: The name of the referenced table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo.ReferencedColumn
member.summary: The name of the referenced column.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyInfo.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyRef
member.summary: Represents a foreign key reference from a column to a referenced table/column.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyRef.ForeignKeyName
member.summary: The name of the foreign key constraint.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyRef.ReferencedSchema
member.summary: The schema of the referenced table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyRef.ReferencedTable
member.summary: The name of the referenced table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyRef.ReferencedColumn
member.summary: The name of the referenced column.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.ForeignKeyRef.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.SchemaModel
member.summary: Represents the complete schema model for a database.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.SchemaModel.Tables
member.summary: All tables discovered in the schema.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.SchemaModel.TableCount
member.summary: Number of tables in the schema.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.SchemaModel.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableInfo
member.summary: Represents table metadata discovered from a database schema.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableInfo.Columns
member.summary: Column metadata for all columns in the table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableInfo.ForeignKeys
member.summary: Foreign key relationships defined on this table.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableInfo.ColumnCount
member.summary: Number of columns in the table.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.TableInfo.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.EntraIdGroup
member.summary: Represents a group object formatted for Microsoft Entra ID import.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.EntraIdGroup.DisplayName
member.summary: The display name of the group.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.EntraIdGroup.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.EntraIdUser
member.summary: Represents a user object formatted for Microsoft Entra ID import.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.EntraIdUser.UsageLocation
member.summary: Usage location for licensing (ISO country code).

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.EntraIdUser.PasswordProfile
member.summary: Password profile with initial password and change requirement.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.EntraIdUser.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.Transformer.TransformFunction
member.summary: Name of the PowerShell function to invoke.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.Transformer.RequiredSemanticTypes
member.summary: Semantic types required by this transformer.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.Transformer.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SqlLabDataGenerator.ValidationResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a data validation check.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ValidationResult.Column
member.summary: Column name, or null for table-level checks.

member.name: P:SqlLabDataGenerator.ValidationResult.Details
member.summary: Human-readable details about the check result.

member.name: M:SqlLabDataGenerator.ValidationResult.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
